query:
SELECT 'Total Contacts' as metric, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contacts
UNION ALL SELECT 'LinkedIn Verified', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichmentSource = 'linkedin'
UNION ALL SELECT 'LLM Generated', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichmentSource = 'llm'
UNION ALL SELECT 'Manual', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual'
UNION ALL SELECT 'NULL source', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE enrichmentSource IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '--- Confidence ---', 0
UNION ALL SELECT 'High confidence', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE confidenceScore = 'high'
UNION ALL SELECT 'Medium confidence', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE confidenceScore = 'medium'
UNION ALL SELECT 'Low confidence', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE confidenceScore = 'low'
UNION ALL SELECT 'NULL confidence', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE confidenceScore IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '--- Verification ---', 0
UNION ALL SELECT 'Verified', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationStatus = 'verified'
UNION ALL SELECT 'AI Suggested', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationStatus = 'ai_suggested'
UNION ALL SELECT 'Unverified', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationStatus = 'unverified'
UNION ALL SELECT 'NULL verification', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationStatus IS NULL
UNION ALL SELECT '--- Scores ---', 0
UNION ALL SELECT 'Score >= 80', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationScore >= 80
UNION ALL SELECT 'Score 60-79', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationScore >= 60 AND verificationScore < 80
UNION ALL SELECT 'Score 40-59', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationScore >= 40 AND verificationScore < 60
UNION ALL SELECT 'Score < 40', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationScore < 40
UNION ALL SELECT 'Score NULL/0', COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE verificationScore IS NULL OR verificationScore = 0;
